14 Gathering Earlier Results to Provide Proofs of Theorems 8, 9 and 11
We gather together earlier results and use them to prove the following Theorems from the main paper.
For an almost balanced model, LP+TRI (the LP relaxation over TRI) is tight. Theorem 8.
For an almost balanced model with special variable s, is a linear function. Theorem 9.

other marginals, then an optimum is achieved with: all edges (other than to variables which have
0 or 1 singleton marginal) are locked up or locked down, with no strong frustrated cycles.
